d: Lucy calls out Aquarius, a Celestial Spirit, to assist her in battle. Aquarius has [[120%]] of Lucy's max HP and 100% of Lucy's other stats. Upon entering battle, Aquarius conjures a water swirl that strikes the 1-tile area with the most enemies, dealing [[300%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies in the area. The affected enemies are knocked into the air and stunned for [[2]]s. The water swirl attack repeats every [[10]]s. Aquarius' normal attack deals [[100%]]<ATK> damage with a range of [[10]] tiles.
Increases the damage of Aquarius' water swirl to [[325%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of Aquarius' water swirl to [[350%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of Aquarius' water swirl to [[375%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage of Aquarius' water swirl to [[400%]]<ATK>.

Lucy delivers a powerful kick to the enemy who has dealt the most cumulative damage, dealing [[240%]]<ATK> damage and stunning them for [[2.5]]s. After the kick, she returns to her original tile. Lucy remains [[unaffected]] while using this skill.

Lucy's Ultimate transforms her into Aquarius for the rest of the battle. While in this form, she conjures water swirls that strike the 1-tile area with the most enemies, dealing [[300%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies in the area. The water swirl also knocks enemies into the air and stuns them for [[2]]s. In Aquarius form, Lucy's attack range extends to 10 tiles.
Aquarius, or Lucy in Aquarius form, can cast Water Barrier to grant a shield that blocks [[450%]]<ATK> damage to the [[weakest]] ally, lasting [[8]]s.
Increases the shielded ally's Ranged DEF by [[50]] while the shield is active.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, casting an Ultimate increases damage dealt by [[8%]] for the next [[8]]s. Unstackable. The first Ultimate cast also permanently increases Energy recovery from attacking by [[8%]].
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Haste, 10 DEF Penetration.

d: When Lucy reaches full Energy while Aquarius is on the battlefield, Aquarius' ATK SPD increases by [[80]].
